description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish and a collapsible stock, commonly seen in urban law enforcement or military contexts. The rifle features a prominent handguard with a full-length Picatinny rail on top, allowing for the attachment of various optics and accessories. The barrel is medium-length and exposed, with a short muzzle device at the end. The magazine is a detachable box type, extending below the receiver, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. Iron sights are mounted on the rail, both at the front and rear, providing basic aiming capability. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible metallic and polymer components, emphasizing durability and modularity.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable box magazine, and full-length Picatinny rail, finished in matte black. Features iron sights and a short muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and full-length Picatinny rail.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the Picatinny rail, iron sights, and the alignment of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with the ejection port and magazine release more visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the magazine, trigger guard, and the underside of the handguard and barrel.
